_meta.purpose: Navigation map for AI agents (Grok, Claude, Antigravity). Read this first before exploring any other file.
_meta.project: AI Virtual Influencer — Funnel: Instagram SFW → Fanvue GFE
_meta.storage_note: Large binary files (images, model weights) are tracked via DVC, NOT git. They exist only on the CEO local machine. Only TEXT and JSON files are in this GitHub repo.

start_here.description: Read these 3 files first — they give complete project context

files.why: Master project briefing. Current phase, locked decisions, open tasks, tool stack, revenue model, all key file paths. Updated every session.
Active task list with RICE scores. Shows exactly what is done, what is next, and who owns each task (CEO / Antigravity / Grok / Claude).
Granular character spec. Hair colour, hair shape, face structure, body measurements, skin tone, eyes, tattoo detail. The authoritative prompt source for image generation.

01_characters.description: All Jasmine character specs and image generation prompts. Fully git-tracked TEXT only — no images here.
01_characters.use_when: Generating images, writing prompts, checking character consistency, verifying body/face/hair specs

files.jasmine/jasmine_reference_prompts.json: Granular modular spec — hair colour, hair shape, face structure, body, skin tone, tattoo. Use this to build or validate any generation prompt.
files.jasmine/jasmine_generation_prompt.md: Ready-to-paste master prompt (positive + negative). Includes outfit swap table, lighting variants, expression variants. Use directly in Grok / Meta AI / Flux.
files.jasmine/jasmine_character_bible.json: Full character source of truth — personality, backstory, voice, visual identity, content rules. The definitive spec.
files.jasmine/jasmine_character_card.md: Short human-readable character card. Good for onboarding or quick reference.
files.jasmine/jasmine_prompts_batch1.json: 40 ready-to-use scene prompts by category (lifestyle_cafe, gym, bedroom_gfe, travel, etc.). Use these for dataset generation.
files.jasmine/jasmine_kling_360_prompts.md: Kling AI video prompts — 360-degree camera movement specs.
files.jasmine/jasmine_runpod_expansion.md: RunPod LoRA training expansion guide — steps, parameters, dataset requirements.
files.jasmine/voice_consistency_blueprint.md: Voice spec — tone, emotion tags, ElevenLabs / OmniVoice settings for consistent audio.
files.jasmine/params/seedance_parameter_framew: Higgsfield Seedance camera and motion parameter guide.
files.jasmine/params/seedance_parameter_schema: JSON schema for Seedance video generation parameters.
files.jasmine/params/universal_negative_prompt: Modular negative prompt library. Import sections as needed.

00_agency.description: Strategy docs, task lists, session logs, P&L, and operational blueprints.
00_agency.use_when: Understanding project strategy, checking task status, reviewing P&L, reading session history

key_files.jasmine_mako_task_table.md: ACTIVE TASK LIST. Phase 0 + Phase 1 with RICE scores, assignees, status. Source of truth for 'what needs to be done'.
key_files.final_strategy_planning.md: Master strategy chessboard — all 38 tasks across 4 phases, platform strategy, funnel design.
key_files.growth_and_revenue_timeline.md: Month-by-month P&L projections with tool costs and revenue by platform.
key_files.content_production_matrix.md: 8-type content production guide — each content type, tools, parameters, volumes.
key_files.content_boundaries_and_blueprint.md: What content is allowed / not allowed on each platform. Instagram hard lines. Fanvue ceiling.
key_files.master_content_and_policy_blueprint.md: Platform policy reference — Instagram TOS, Fanvue rules, X limits.
key_files.growth_hacks_playbook.md: Growth tactics — engagement loops, follower acceleration, cross-platform funnels.
key_files.business_strategy_goal.md: High-level business goals and MRR milestones.
key_files.pnl_chart.html: Local P&L visualization (open in browser). Same data as Vercel dashboard.
key_files.session_logs/: Permanent record of all CEO ↔ Claude ↔ Antigravity sessions. Named YYYY-MM-DD_session_NN.md
key_files.session_logs/ai_failure_audit_2026-04-15: CRITICAL: 8 documented AI agent failures. Read to avoid repeating them.
key_files.scripts/: Utility scripts — dataset sorter, competitor scraper, chatter matrix, ideas skill.
key_files.archive/: Deprecated research docs from early sessions. Do not use as active reference.

00_studio_template.description: One-click template for duplicating the studio to a new character. Generic 'Virtual Influencer' structure.
00_studio_template.use_when: Launching a second character after Jasmine is live

files.README.md: Instructions for using the duplication script.
files.duplication_script.sh: Shell script — copies full folder structure with new character name.

02_reference_images.description: DVC-TRACKED. Not visible on GitHub. Lives on CEO local machine only.
02_reference_images.note: 19 Grok-generated Jasmine reference images. All marked 'selected'. Accessible via: dvc pull 02_reference_images.dvc

03_ai_models.description: DVC-TRACKED for images/weights. Some text files are git-tracked directly.
03_ai_models.note: Contains LoRA training dataset (39 training_ready images + captions, 50+ need_review images) and generation scripts.

git_tracked_files.jasmine_mako/generation/jasmine_batch_ge: Python script to batch-generate images using the prompt library.
git_tracked_files.jasmine_mako/generation/jasmine_instanti: Jupyter notebook for InstantID v2 face-lock generation.
git_tracked_files.jasmine_mako/generation/jasmine_prompts_: Mirror copy of the batch prompts (canonical version is in 01_characters/).
Log of which images were accepted/rejected for training.
git_tracked_files.jasmine_mako/training_data/training_read: 39 image+caption pairs ready for LoRA training. Each .jpg has a matching .txt caption file.

11_automation.description: All automation scripts, agent prompts, and workflow pipelines.
11_automation.use_when: Automating content generation, scheduling, scraping, or running agent workflows

scripts/.curate.py: Dataset curation script — sorts images into accepted/rejected.
scripts/.jasmine_batch_generator.py: Batch image generation from prompt library.
scripts/.sanitize_tattoos.py: Post-processing to clean up AI tattoo errors.

agents/.00_RESEARCH_GATE.md: Agent gate prompt — research workflow instructions.
agents/.01_DISPLAY_TASK_TABLE.md: Agent prompt to display current task table.

workflows/.higgsfield_viral_formats.md: Viral content format templates for Higgsfield.
workflows/.higgsfield_cinematic_commercial_pipeline: Full pipeline for product ad generation.
workflows/.00_PRE_FLIGHT_OPSEC_GATE.md: Pre-upload checklist — EXIF strip, metadata clean, OPSEC verification.

studio_sync/.studio-sync.sh: Rclone-based sync script — pushes project files to Google Drive.
studio_sync/.setup_drive.py: One-time setup script to create VirtualInfluencerStudio folder on Google Drive.

10_research.description: Platform research, competitor analysis, AI tool evaluations.
10_research.use_when: Understanding platform rules, competitor benchmarks, tool capabilities

files.platform_research/instagram_content_poli: Instagram TOS deep-dive — hard lines, safe harbour, moderation patterns.
files.platform_research/ai_tools_research_2026: AI tool comparison matrix — capabilities, pricing, NSFW limits.
files.platform_research/grok-chat.json: Saved Grok research session — platform strategy discussion.
files.platform_research/grok-chat2.json: Saved Grok research session — tool stack validation.
files.competitor_research/muskan_kariya_case_s: Indian creator case study — market validation data.
files.transcript_archive_2026.zip: YouTube transcript archive (zipped). Contains raw research from strategy videos.

13_finance.description: Revenue tracking and tool cost ledger.

files.tool_costs.md: Itemised tool costs in INR — Phase 0 and Phase 1+.
files.revenue_log.md: Running revenue log (currently empty — nothing is live yet).

07_monetization.description: Platform-specific monetization strategies and account data.

files.fanvue/fanvue_monetization_strategy.md: Fanvue subscription pricing, PPV strategy, GFE content plan.
files.facebook_stars_strategy.md: Facebook Stars monetization approach (activates at M2 / 500 followers).
files.fanvue/emails/: Onboarding emails from Fanvue — subscription tiers, payout info, verified badge process.

files.post_queue.md: Content posting queue — upcoming scheduled posts.

20_tech.description: Vercel P&L dashboard (Next.js 14 + Supabase). Live at https://virtual-influencer-dashboard.vercel.app
20_tech.note: node_modules excluded from git. Run 'npm install' after cloning. See CLAUDE.md for deploy instructions.

key_files.jasmine-dashboard/components/PLDashboard: Main dashboard component — all charts, tooltips, table, glossary.
key_files.jasmine-dashboard/app/page.js: Next.js page — fetches Supabase data, renders PLDashboard.
key_files.jasmine-dashboard/lib/fallback-data.js: Hardcoded P&L fallback (used if Supabase is down).

do_not_read.description: These paths exist in git but have zero research value for AI agents
paths: 00_agency/archive/ — Deprecated early-session docs, superseded by current files

locked_decisions.content_ceiling: Option A — Lena Paul level. Deep cleavage, micro bikini, sheer fabric. Nipple ALWAYS covered. No nudity, no topless. EVER. CEO personal values — not negotiable.
locked_decisions.character: Jasmine only. All prior names (Rhea, Riyaz) are dead.
locked_decisions.india_pricing: Always verify actual INR price — India is cheaper than USD × 93.08

P0_05.blocks: Everything downstream — LoRA training, Instagram launch, Fanvue launch

P0_07.task: Train Jasmine Flux LoRA on Vast.ai GPU

agent_roles.Claude_Code: File system, spec compliance, code, persistent memory, document management, P&L, task tracking. Runs in VS Code.
agent_roles.Antigravity: Live browser research, creative strategy, GFE copywriting, captions, DM scripts, code review. Cannot write files or run code.
agent_roles.Grok: Market intel, X/Reddit trend sweeps, image generation (Grok image model), YouTube research. Lives at x.ai.
agent_roles.CEO: Physical accounts, payments, device operations, final approval on all decisions.
